title: Ultimate Grilled Cheese
description: The perfect grilled cheese — buttery, golden, and oozing with melted cheese. Simple perfection.

steps.instruction: Spread softened butter evenly on one side of each bread slice.
Heat a skillet over medium-low heat.
Place one slice of bread butter-side down in the pan. Layer on the cheeses (and Dijon if using), then top with the second slice, butter-side up.
Cook for 3–4 minutes until the bottom is deep golden brown.
Flip carefully and cook another 2–3 minutes until golden and the cheese is fully melted.
Remove from heat, let rest 1 minute, then slice diagonally and serve.

notes: The secret is medium-low heat — low and slow ensures the cheese melts before the bread burns.
